prompt: Create a cinematic vertical portrait of a young South Asian woman in a moody black-and-red 90s film-noir style. She has long wavy dark brown hair with a center part, expressive brown eyes, soft natural makeup, and a calm romantic expression while looking slightly upward toward a man in the foreground. She wears a white stone-work saree with delicate shimmer embroidery, a sleeveless black blouse, silver oxidized jhumka earrings, a layered silver choker necklace with a dark central stone, bangles, and rings. Compose the scene as an intimate close-up: the woman is centered and sharply lit, while the man appears only as a dark out-of-focus silhouette from behind on the right side, his hands gently holding hers near the lower center. Use high-contrast low-key lighting with a deep black background, strong red rim light glowing along her hair and shoulders, soft warm key light on her face, subtle haze, dreamy cinematic glow, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, and fine film grain. Keep the palette dominated by black, cream-white, silver, and saturated crimson red. No text, no watermark, no extra people, no modern props.
promptEn: Create a cinematic vertical portrait of a young South Asian woman in a moody black-and-red 90s film-noir style. She has long wavy dark brown hair with a center part, expressive brown eyes, soft natural makeup, and a calm romantic expression while looking slightly upward toward a man in the foreground. She wears a white stone-work saree with delicate shimmer embroidery, a sleeveless black blouse, silver oxidized jhumka earrings, a layered silver choker necklace with a dark central stone, bangles, and rings. Compose the scene as an intimate close-up: the woman is centered and sharply lit, while the man appears only as a dark out-of-focus silhouette from behind on the right side, his hands gently holding hers near the lower center. Use high-contrast low-key lighting with a deep black background, strong red rim light glowing along her hair and shoulders, soft warm key light on her face, subtle haze, dreamy cinematic glow, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, and fine film grain. Keep the palette dominated by black, cream-white, silver, and saturated crimson red. No text, no watermark, no extra people, no modern props.
promptZh: 创作一张电影感竖构图肖像，主角是 一位年轻的南亚女性，采用忧郁的黑红 90 年代黑色电影风格。她留着 中分长波浪深棕色卷发，拥有富有表现力的棕色眼睛、柔和的自然妆容，神情平静而浪漫，微微抬头看向前景中的一名男性。她身穿 带有精致闪亮刺绣的白色宝石装饰纱丽，搭配无袖黑色上衣、银色氧化耳环、带有深色中心宝石的叠层银色颈圈、手镯和戒指。构图采用亲密的特写镜头：女性位于画面中心且光线明亮，而右侧前景中仅出现男性的深色失焦剪影，他的双手在画面下方中心位置轻轻握住她的手。使用高对比度的低调照明，背景为深黑色，头发和肩膀处有强烈的红色轮廓光，面部有柔和的暖色主光，带有轻微的雾气、梦幻般的电影质感、浅景深、逼真的皮肤纹理和细腻的胶片颗粒感。色调以黑色、奶油白、银色和饱和的深红色为主。无文字，无水印，无多余人物，无现代道具。
